title: CC to pulse - but outside of the organization

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

Emailing to items is a very neat and convenient feature, but there are 2 different addresses for each pulse. one only for account users, and one for people outside the organization.

Thing is, we just had a very annoying revelation, it appears that the email column can’t “CC to pulse” the email that is available for people outside the organization, only the internal one.

Adding another toggle button to choose between two email options would be great.

posts.author: blee (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for the option to CC an external pulse address. Much needed!
